text: Apparently the Internet Archive now has a malware archive. That might be a good place to start, but obviously, use extreme caution.
author: @HeadsetGuy

text: I don't think the text comes from the virus itself, but from the body of a spam email used to distribute the virus. Spambots will fill the body of trap emails with randomly shuffled sentence fragments from books so that spam filters think it's a personal message and fail to block it.
